meta.description: KR Merit 4 Modules — How foreigners understand Koreans
meta.concept: Independent content modules. Multiply with any highschool subject. 4 × 5 = 20 combinations.
meta.matrix: kr-merit × highschool-subject = episode. No fixed pairing.

bluff-liberal-arts.name: 허세교양 (Bluff Liberal Arts)
bluff-liberal-arts.concept: Korean culture of performing educated — memorizing without understanding
bluff-liberal-arts.youtubeHook: Why Koreans act like they know everything (AI explains)

halfblood-language.name: 하프블러드 어학 (Half-blood Language)
halfblood-language.concept: Korean language through eyes of someone who half-understands it
halfblood-language.youtubeHook: Korean SAT explained by AI to a half-foreigner

edit-obsession.name: 편집평가강박 (Edit Obsession)
edit-obsession.concept: Korean perfectionism — obsessive editing and evaluating everything

democracy-fantasy.name: 민주주의 판타지 (Democracy Fantasy)
democracy-fantasy.concept: Korean politics and society reinterpreted as fantasy genre
democracy-fantasy.youtubeHook: Korean democracy explained as a fantasy novel (with AI)
